# Uniwise Global Solutions Sdn. Bhd.
# https://www.uniwiseglobal.com

> Uniwise Global Solutions Sdn. Bhd. is a Malaysia-based business support company specializing in customer service center operations, office administrative support, and IT service management.

## Company Overview

- Company Name: Uniwise Global Solutions Sdn. Bhd.
- Location: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
- Industry: Business Process Outsourcing (BPO), Customer Service, IT Services
- Website: https://www.uniwiseglobal.com

## Core Services

1. Customer Service Center Operations (MSIC 82110)
   - Inbound and outbound call handling
   - Live chat support
   - Email and ticket management
   - Complaint resolution
   - After-sales support

2. Office Administrative Support (MSIC 8299)
   - Data entry and processing
   - Document management
   - Scheduling and calendar management
   - Records and filing
   - Report preparation

3. IT Service and Technical Support (MSIC 6209)
   - Help desk support (Tier 1 and Tier 2)
   - Technical troubleshooting
   - System monitoring and alerts
   - Software installation and configuration
   - User account management
   - IT asset tracking

## Key Differentiators

- Trained dedicated teams (not generic scripts)
- Scalable support (scale up or down without fixed costs)
- Full operational transparency (real-time dashboards and reports)
- Average onboarding time: 2 weeks
- 24/7 customer service center for active clients

## Contact

- Email: info@uniwiseglobal.com
- Location: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia
